metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
	TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		"MinEmpty", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Tooltip Info'[Empty])))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DM3FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Details'[Design Factor])),
			NOT('Details'[Design Factor] IN {"UI/UX"})
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(
						ROLLUPGROUP('Details'[Design Factor], 'Details'[DFSort]), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal",
						ROLLUPGROUP('Details'[Topic], 'Details'[TSort]),
						"IsDM1Total",
						NONVISUAL(__DM3FilterTable)
					),
					__DS0FilterTable
				)
			),
			OR(
				OR(
					OR(
						NOT(ISBLANK('Details'[Design Factor])),
						NOT(ISBLANK('Details'[DFSort]))
					),
					NOT(ISBLANK('Details'[Topic]))
				),
				NOT(ISBLANK('Details'[TSort]))
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			502,
			__DS0Core,
			[IsGrandTotalRowTotal],
			0,
			'Details'[DFSort],
			1,
			'Details'[Design Factor],
			1,
			[IsDM1Total],
			0,
			'Details'[TSort],
			1,
			'Details'[Topic],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		"MinEmpty", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Tooltip Info'[Empty])))
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC,
	'Details'[DFSort],
	'Details'[Design Factor],
	[IsDM1Total] DESC,
	'Details'[TSort],
	'Details'[Topic]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Net sales - category breakdown"}, 'Tooltip Info'[nombre])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Sold"}, 'Sales'[Status])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Product'[Product],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			"SumAmount", CALCULATE(SUM('Sales'[Amount])),
			"Product_Top_N", IGNORE('Design DAX'[Product Top N])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, [SumAmount], 0, 'Product'[Product], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[SumAmount] DESC, 'Product'[Product]

ORDER BY

metrics.visualTitle: Last Refresh: Jun 30th, 2019 / Chicago, IL, USA

metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		SAMPLE(1002, __DS0Core, '% Return Rate'[% Return Rate], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"WIF_Forecast", IGNORE('Analysis DAX'[WIF Forecast])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"WIF_Profit", IGNORE('Analysis DAX'[WIF Profit])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('Product'[Category Image]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable3)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'Product'[Category Image], 1)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"MinProduct2", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Product'[Product])))
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Product'[Category Image]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"MinCategory", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Product'[Category])))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"Net_Sales_Label", IGNORE('Design DAX'[Net Sales Label])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"Profit_Indicator", IGNORE('Design DAX'[Profit Indicator])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Calendar'[Date],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			"WIF_Total_Forecast", 'Analysis DAX'[WIF Total Forecast]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryShowAll = 
		ADDMISSINGITEMS(
			'Calendar'[Date],
			__DS0Core,
			'Calendar'[Date],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			CALCULATETABLE(
				DISTINCT('Calendar'[Date]),
				KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable3)
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		SAMPLE(3502, __DS0PrimaryShowAll, 'Calendar'[Date], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'Calendar'[Date]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"Return_Rate", IGNORE('Analysis DAX'[Return Rate])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Calendar'[Date],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			"Total_Return_Rate", 'Analysis DAX'[Total Return Rate],
			"Return_Rate", IGNORE('Analysis DAX'[Return Rate])
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		SAMPLE(3502, __DS0Core, 'Calendar'[Date], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'Calendar'[Date]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"MinEmpty", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Tooltip Info'[Empty])))
	)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(

		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 =

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('Product'[Product Image]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable3)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'Product'[Product Image], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Product'[Product Image]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('% Return Rate'[% Return Rate])),
			'% Return Rate'[% Return Rate] = 25
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"OneNote"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('Store'[Store], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			"WIF_Profit", 'Analysis DAX'[WIF Profit],
			"Net_Sales", 'Analysis DAX'[Net Sales],
			"WIF_Forecast", 'Analysis DAX'[WIF Forecast]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryShowAll = 
		ADDMISSINGITEMS(
			'Store'[Store],
			__DS0Core,
			ROLLUPISSUBTOTAL('Store'[Store], [IsGrandTotalRowTotal]),
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0PrimaryShowAll, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, [WIF_Profit], 0, 'Store'[Store], 1)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryShowAllNoTotals = 
		FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0PrimaryShowAll), [IsGrandTotalRowTotal] = FALSE)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0PrimaryShowAllNoTotals,
		"MinNet_Sales", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [Net_Sales]),
		"MaxNet_Sales", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [Net_Sales]),
		"MinWIF_Forecast", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [WIF_Forecast]),
		"MaxWIF_Forecast", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [WIF_Forecast])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, [WIF_Profit] DESC, 'Store'[Store]
